javadoc_before: /** * Sets the entries in column number column * as a column matrix. Column indices start at 0. * * @param column the column to be set * @param matrix column matrix (must have one column and the same number of rows * as the instance) * @throws org.apache.commons.math3.exception.OutOfRangeException * if the specified column index is invalid. * @throws MatrixDimensionMismatchException if the matrix dimensions do * not match one instance column. */
